S.FORM: == satangahan : == udu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ŤáÄťÉ® nu Amilika : buttocks nu Zipun :ŚįĽ,ŤáÄ u canan ku udu(uduśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź Wikipayke paybalucu'ay pulungamin a cudad-ŤáÄ == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == udu u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :** nu amir~…ĺika : butto ¶ks nu zipun :*,* u ¶anan ku udu(udu***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * wikipajk…ô pajbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj pur~…ĺuŇčamin a ¶udad-* == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == udu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ŤáÄťÉ® nu Amilika : buttocks nu Zipun :ŚįĽ,ŤáÄ u canan ku udu(uduśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź Wikipayke paybalucu'ay pulungamin a cudad-ŤáÄ == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
